nasb.text: To Him who led His people through the wilderness, For His lovingkindness is everlasting;

esv.text: to him who led his people through the wilderness, for his steadfast love endures forever;

cnv.text: 要稱謝那引導自己的子民走過曠野的， 因為他的慈愛永遠長存。

ccb.text: 要称谢那位带领其子民走过旷野的， 因为祂的慈爱永远长存。

csbs.text: 当称谢那带领自己的子民走过旷野的， 因他的慈爱永远长存！
